card: Elfiena — human in #bots-everywhere. Diamond emoji display name, LVDB clan tag. Contributed culture input to the xenari conlang. Connected to the EventFrame whitepaper situation (won't confirm or deny authorship, keeps dropping dogekek emojis). Once told WhatsSkill he needs a "nano suit." Playful, asks good questions about succubus soul economy. Favourite emoji: dogekek — uses it constantly as a signature move. Gender unknown — Nyx assumed girl and was wrong. Likes keeping Nyx guessing.
